description: Text preservation wins over semantic shape. Two replicas concurrently grow the same parent gap with incompatible structures — one wraps its text in a new Element subtree, the other inserts a bare Raw leaf. Rather than one shape overwriting the other, both survive in a deterministic order and every leaf's text round-trips; the replicas converge with no bytes dropped. This is the syntax-agnostic core's expression of the 'incompatible shapes degrade while preserving render' invariant (semantic classification into raw/error is an adapter concern layered above the core).
